title: The Night We Danced
content: The charity gala was filled with elegant music and beautifully decorated tables. Chloe planned to stay only for dinner before going home early. Instead, Ryan invited her to dance when the orchestra began playing a slow melody. They spent the evening talking between songs and laughing whenever they forgot the dance steps. Hours passed without either of them noticing. Looking back later, Chloe realized she could barely remember the decorations or the food. What she remembered most clearly was the feeling of dancing with someone who made every moment feel effortless.
